Test mighty component

Source: R/mighty_component_test.R
mighty_component_test.Rd

Class for a testing a mighty component.

Method new()

Create test component from rendered template.

Usage

mighty_component_test$new(template, id)

Arguments

template

character Rendered template such as output from mighty_component$render().

id

character ID of the component. Either name of standard or path to local.

Method check_coverage()

Method clone()

The objects of this class are cloneable with this method.

Usage

mighty_component_test$clone(deep = FALSE)

Arguments

deep

Whether to make a deep clone.
